nasb.text: His power will be mighty, but not by his own power, And he will destroy to an extraordinary degree And prosper and perform his will; He will destroy mighty men and the holy people.

esv.text: His power shall be great—but not by his own power; and he shall cause fearful destruction and shall succeed in what he does, and destroy mighty men and the people who are the saints.

cnv.text: 他的權勢強大，卻不是出於自己的能力； 他必造成驚人的毀滅； 他任意而行，凡事順利； 他必毀滅有強力的， 又毀滅聖民。

ccb.text: 他势力强大，却不是靠自己的力量。他必带来可怕的毁灭，而且凡事亨通，他必毁灭强者和圣民。
